headerDisplay: Backs up your Homebridge configuration to any Git remote (GitHub, Forgejo, GitLab, self-hosted) on every change and on a schedule.
footerDisplay: Powered by [isomorphic-git](https://isomorphic-git.org) - no `git` binary required on the host.

branch.title: Branch
branch.description: Branch to push backups to. The plugin will fast-forward from this branch before each commit.

git_username.title: Git Username
git_username.description: Most token-based providers accept any value here (e.g. 'git' for GitHub PATs; the token-owner username for Forgejo/Gitea).

git_token.title: Git Token / Password
git_token.description: Personal Access Token, deploy key, or password used for HTTPS authentication. Needs write access to the target repository.

file_path.title: File path in repository
file_path.description: Path within the repository where the Homebridge config.json should be written. Subdirectories are created automatically.

backup_interval.title: Backup interval (minutes)
backup_interval.description: Scheduled backup cadence. The plugin also commits immediately when the Homebridge config changes on disk.
